title: HG Air Fryer Cleaner - Powerful, Safe Solution for Removing Caked-On Grease & Food - Suitable for All Air Fryers - 250ml
features: HG Air Fryer Cleaner: This powerful formula will lift even the toughest of grease deposits in your air fryer, letting you use it as intended without heavy-duty scrubbing or harsh chemicals
Specially formulated: Made specifically for lifting grease that gets trapped in air fryers, this air fryer tray cleaner will clear residue where other degreasers and cleaning solutions fall short
Component safe: Tough on grease, but gentle on the interior components of your air fryer, this product can be used regularly without the risk of damaging the inner workings of the appliance
Deep-cleaning: This powerful air fryer oven cleaner soaks gradually into cooking residue and lifts even the toughest deposits for a spotless result
Easy to use: Place the cooled-down air fryer basket and pan into a sink, dispense 50ml into the inner pan and use the supplied brush to coat. Leave for one hour then rinse with warm water
description: Product Description The HG air fryer cleaner is a specially-formulated air fryer tray cleaner, ideal for clearing stubborn grease deposits from your air fryer and keeping it in great cooking condition. The powerful formula works deep into hard, stubborn deposits and lifts them where other washing up liquids have failed. Tough on grease, but gentle on the fryer, this liquid will clear the toughest of cooking residue without causing any damage to the fryer's inner workings. How to clean your air fryer with HG air fryer ® cleaner 1. Ensure that the air fryer basket and inner pan have cooled down completely, then place them in a sink. 2. Dispense 50 ml of air fryer cleaner liquid (about a fifth of the bottle) into the inner pan and use the brush supplied to coat the rest of the inner pan and the basket. 3. Leave the inner pan and basket in the sink to soak for one hour and then rinse thoroughly with warm water. If necessary, use a soft washing-up brush or non-abrasive sponge to remove any leftover deposits.
